overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in dark robes exploring a dimly lit medieval castle interior with stone corridors, Gothic arches, and torch lighting. The character walks through various halls and chambers, eventually entering a large circular room containing an animated stone gargoyle statue.

events.description: exits small stone room into main torch-lit corridor with Gothic arches
passes under first ornate chandelier, increasing illumination

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily from the starting chamber into a stone corridor, passing wall sconces and debris

entered.detail: lit torch mounted on the stone wall providing warm orange light
broken stone bench with rubble and debris scattered around it
ornate iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from vaulted ceiling
Gothic stone arch marking the entrance to the main corridor
thick cylindrical stone support column along the corridor

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a small stone antechamber with a lit wall sconce and broken bench. The character walks forward into a torch-lit Gothic corridor, passing under an ornate chandelier as the space opens slightly with stone pillars appearing along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: long gallery with hanging heraldic banners

events.description: passing green and red heraldic banners hanging from the walls

agents.ego_description: continues walking through the banner-lined corridor toward a distant stone fireplace and archway

entered.detail: tattered green banner with emblem hanging from ceiling
red banner with heraldic symbol on the right wall
large stone fireplace visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a long gallery lined with heraldic banners in green and red. The corridor features stone pillars and chandeliers overhead, with a large stone fireplace becoming visible at the far end as the character progresses forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand bedroom chamber with four-poster bed and ornate fireplace

events.description: enters large bedroom chamber containing an ornate fireplace and canopy bed
character turns to survey the room, approaching the large fireplace

agents.ego_description: enters the bedroom, walks toward the ornate fireplace, and looks around the chamber including the four-poster bed

entered.detail: large decorative stone fireplace with carved relief above the mantel
ornate wooden canopy bed with red curtains and straw mattress
wall hanging depicting a scene on the right wall
circular patterned rug on the stone floor in front of the fireplace

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious bedroom dominated by an ornate stone fireplace and a four-poster bed with red curtains. After approaching the fireplace, the character turns to survey the room, revealing tapestries on the walls and a circular patterned rug on the floor before heading back toward the entrance.

events.description: exits the bedroom back into the narrow torch-lit corridor

agents.ego_description: turns and walks back through the stone corridors, returning toward the main hall area

entered.detail: lit torch mounted on the left corridor wall
lit torch mounted on the right corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character exits the bedroom and returns through narrow stone corridors illuminated by wall-mounted torches. The space feels more confined as the character walks past stone pillars and arches, heading toward a larger chamber visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular chamber with central gargoyle statue

events.description: enters large circular chamber with massive stone gargoyle statue on central pedestal
stone gargoyle animates and spreads its wings as character approaches closely

agents.ego_description: approaches the large stone gargoyle statue and circles around it cautiously as it begins to animate

notable_agents.action: large stone gargoyle statue that animates, spreads its wings, and turns its head

entered.detail: massive stone winged gargoyle perched on a circular pedestal
raised stone platform base supporting the gargoyle statue
stone staircase leading upward along the curved wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a vast circular chamber dominated by a massive stone gargoyle statue on a central pedestal. As the character approaches and circles the statue, the stone creature animates—spreading its wings and turning its head—while the character continues to move around the circular space, passing under distant chandeliers near a stone staircase.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of dimly lit castle interiors that transition from narrow stone corridors into a vast, supernatural chamber. It begins in a small antechamber with a lit wall sconce, moving forward into a torch-lit Gothic corridor where the space opens up beneath an ornate chandelier and stone pillars. As the character progresses, the scene expands into a long gallery lined with heraldic banners before shifting into a spacious bedroom featuring a four-poster bed and a large stone fireplace. The camera then retreats back through the confined, torch-lit corridors and arches, creating a sense of compression before finally opening into a massive circular chamber. This final space is dominated by a central stone gargoyle statue that animates and spreads its wings as the camera circles the pedestal under the glow of distant chandeliers.
